snippet: An Outside School Hours Care (OSHC) service provides education and care for primary school-age children (generally ages 5 to 12 years) outside school hours and during school holidays. OSHC services also often provide education and care on student-free days. OSHC services are usually located at or close to primary schools. They may also be offered in locations such as: Hours and locations will vary depending on community needs, generally operating on weekdays: OSHC is an education and care service that supports children to: An OSHC service provides a range of benefits for the school community that support children’s learning, achievement, engagement and wellbeing.
